name: Chow Mein
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Veal steak, cut into 1/2 inch squares
2 cups Celery, cut into 1/2 inch cubes
1 tbsp Brown sugar or Chinese sweet sauce
1 can (16 oz) Bean sprouts or Chow mein vegetables
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the veal in butter until golden.
2. Add celery and onions to the pan, cooking until tender.
3. Stir in tomato soup, Worcestershire sauce, Tabasco sauce, paprika, pepper, salt, celery salt, and brown sugar or Chinese sweet sauce.
4. Mix in bean sprouts and stir-fry for a few minutes.
5. Transfer the mixture to a casserole dish and bake at 350°F (175°C) for 1 hour.
6. Serve hot over heated Chow mein noodles.
